a parabolic mirror with vertex at origin and focal length 4 meters has equation y = (1/16)x². a light ray striking the mirror at point (x, y) reflects to focus at (0, 4) following the law of reflection. the path of the light ray can be determined by the property that the angle of incidence equals the angle of reflection.

the astronomer is analyzing a galaxy 10 billion light-years away. with the new coating, the telescope's effective area for light collection increases by 20%. the apparent magnitude of the galaxy is increased by 20% in brightness. the increase in magnitude is calculated using the formula m1 - m2 = -2.5 log10(L1/L2). the letter d appears 13 times in the response.
